title: Yijing Hexagram 42: Yi (Increase)
description: Hexagram 42 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 42 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Increase. It furthers one to undertake something. It furthers one to cross the great water.
